local_problems: a tax collector has hired grave robbers
local_secrets: the founders bargained away the settlement's shadow
the shrine conceals a royal corpse
the reeve feeds prisoners to something underground
every family shares the same recurring dream
the oldest houses are built from petrified giants
nearby_dangers: the bell-witch in the eastern fen
a sleeping basilisk beneath the road
carrion knights collecting an ancient tithe
a red mist that remembers violence
local_laws: No blade may be drawn after moonrise
Every stranger must bring salt to the shrine
The names of the dead may not be spoken indoors
Red cloth is reserved for the watch
local_events: a public accusation turns into a duel
a funeral procession stops and points at a stranger
masked traders offer a dangerous bargain
a child returns with someone else's shadow
rumors: Blue fire has appeared in the old cave
Someone is buying teeth without asking where they came from
The northern path is safe only for liars
A saint's sword lies under the hill
The reeve has not slept in eleven years
A wolf in a silver collar speaks courtly Common
location_descriptions: Smoke hangs beneath low rafters and everyone watches the door
Charms of bone and blue thread cover the lintel
The floor slopes toward a sealed iron drain
A warm golden light makes the surrounding street look colder
The walls are painted with scenes no local will explain
useful_resources: lamp oil and six dry torches
a guide who knows the old paths
